title: Colony PCR on V. natriegens
author: Daniel Bauersachs
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.pundnve

steps.instruction: %s %s 5 μl reaction buffer 0,5 μl dNTPs 0,5 μl primer foward 0,5 μl primer reverse 0,1 μl one-taq polymerase 18,4 μl A.dest. = 25 μl Now you have to pick one single colony with a pipette tip and put it into your reaction mix. After ~15 seconds you can take the tip out and start the PCR.
